title: Discourse Markers & Linking Language
topics: spoken · written · contrast · addition · result · position
description: Diskurzní markery — spojky a přechodové výrazy pro plynulý text.
notes: Beginning of sentence + comma: 'Furthermore, the results were inconclusive.'
Middle of sentence with commas: 'The results, moreover, were inconclusive.'
After semicolon: 'The plan failed; nevertheless, we persisted.'
⚠️  despite + noun: 'Despite the rain,...' (NOT 'Despite it rained')
⚠️  although + clause: 'Although it rained,...' (NOT 'Although the rain')
⚠️  'Moreover' sounds unnatural in speech — use 'also' or 'what's more'

examples.en: The plan was expensive. Furthermore, it was risky.
examples.cz: Plán byl drahý. Navíc byl riskantní.

examples.en: Sales fell; nevertheless, the company remained profitable.
examples.cz: Prodeje klesly; přesto společnost zůstala zisková.

examples.en: As a result of the changes, productivity increased.
examples.cz: V důsledku změn se produktivita zvýšila.

examples.en: On balance, the benefits outweigh the risks.
examples.cz: Celkově vzato přínosy převažují nad riziky.

quiz.sentence: She worked hard. ___, she got promoted. (result)
___ the plan was flawed, it was approved. (admittedly)
___ all things considered, it was the right decision.

tasks: 1. Rewrite this paragraph adding at least 5 discourse markers:
2. Write a paragraph arguing a point, using markers from each category
3. Read a quality English article and highlight all discourse markers you find
